  return <MDXLayout {...layoutProps} {...props} components={components} mdxType="MDXLayout">



    <p>{`For a short overview of Cúram Education, see the following short introductory `}<a href="https://youtu.be/3H9YaVM0au0" target="_blank">{`video`}</a>{`.`}</p>
    <h2>{`Why take training?`}</h2>
    <p>{`If you’ve seen anything of the Cúram software, chances are you appreciate that it is a big product, with not just vast functionality to support complex business use cases, but also technically sophisticated and very configurable.`}</p>
    <h2>{`Who is Cúram Education for?`}</h2>
    <p>{`Our training typically falls into one of 2 categories. It’s broadly either for Business users, or for Technical users - not only that, but it ranges from the 10,000ft viewpoint, all the way down to the lowest-level detail. We understand not everyone has the same needs.`}</p>
    <h2>{`In what formats are courses offered?`}</h2>
    <h3>{`Presentation Format`}</h3>
    <p>{`Training courses are offered in presentation format - meaning that a course is typically created as a presentation that can be either consumed independently by the student (this is usually referred to as Self-Paced Learning), or an instructor may deliver it (remotely, or in person).`}</p>
    <h3>{`Personal Lab Environments`}</h3>
    <p>{`Since we perceive there to be significant value in ‘learning by doing’, there are practical exercises that accompany every topic of every course, performed by the student in their own, personal copy of a lab environment - this is a specially-configured virtual machine, which runs the Cúram software, set up in a certain way to support the lab exercises and learning experience of the student.`}</p>
    <h2>{`What courses and learning paths are available?`}</h2>
    <p>{`We understand that different students have different needs, and so our training is organised into specific tracks, mostly aligned with the different core role types (i.e. Business User, or Technical User). For a full picture, see our `}<Link to="/spm/education/training_courses" mdxType="Link">{`Available Courses`}</Link>{` page.`}</p>
    <h2>{`Cúram Certification Program`}</h2>
    <p>{`The V8.X Business Analyst Certification Test is now available in Prometric. The two new V8.X Developer Certification Tests are scheduled to be released in Q1 of 2024.`}</p>
    <p>{`In the meantime, the V7.X Developer Training Courses and Certification Tests are still valuable and relevant for people who will work on Cúram V8 implementation projects.`}</p>
    <p>{`For more information, see the `}<Link to="/spm/education/certification" mdxType="Link">{`Cúram Certification Program`}</Link>{`.`}</p>
    <h3>{`How can I book Cúram training or certification tests?`}</h3>
    <p>{`To get started, please contact your Cúram Sales representative, or email `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "mailto:curameducation@merative.com"
      }}>{`curameducation@merative.com`}</a></p>
    <h2>{`Contact us`}</h2>
    <p>{`To get in touch generally, please email `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "mailto:curameducation@merative.com"
      }}>{`curameducation@merative.com`}</a>{`.`}</p>

    </MDXLayout>;
